bead.title: work: remove numeric retry floors from bead metadata
bead.description:
PROBLEM
TD-037 prohibits numeric retry floors on beads. Retry escalation currently stores numeric `MinPower` floors in bead `Extra` through `TriagePowerHintKey`, and later reads them as dispatch input.

ROOT CAUSE WITH FILE:LINE
- `cli/cmd/agent_execute_loop_escalation.go:290` defines `numericPowerFloorHint` and reads bead `Extra`.
- `cli/cmd/try.go:290` applies numeric bead floors to `requestMinPower`.
- `cli/internal/agent/execute_bead_loop.go:3563`, `4119`, and `4189` write numeric retry floors through `TriagePowerHintKey`.

PROPOSED FIX
Delete `numericPowerFloorHint` and every call to it. Remove numeric floor writes from no-changes retry, route-exclusion retry, ladder-exhaustion handling, and any related tests. Keep retry escalation as execution policy/evidence inside the current attempt path; do not replace the removed behavior with another bead `Extra` key.

IN-SCOPE FILES
- `cli/cmd/agent_execute_loop_escalation.go`
- `cli/cmd/try.go`
- `cli/internal/agent/execute_bead_loop.go`
- `cli/internal/agent/execute_bead_loop_test.go`
- `cli/internal/agent/execute_bead_route_exclusion_test.go`
- `cli/internal/agent/execute_bead_loop_escalation_aborted_test.go`
- `cli/internal/agent/execute_bead_repair_escalation_test.go`

NON-SCOPE
- Do not change the new `triage.estimated_difficulty` parser beyond using it as the initial difficulty input.
- Do not add any new bead-level retry key.
- Do not change Fizeau route selection or concrete provider/model fallback.
bead.acceptance:
1. `cd cli && go test ./cmd ./internal/agent -run 'TestTryIgnoresNumericBeadPowerHint|TestInvestigationRetryIgnoresNumericBeadPowerHint|TestNoChangesRetryDoesNotWriteTriagePowerHintKey|TestFailedRoutesDoNotWriteNumericPowerHint|TestProviderConnectivityRouteExclusionDoesNotWriteNumericPowerHint|TestReviewBlock_EscalatesImplementerWithoutBeadPowerHint' -count=1` passes.
2. `rg -n 'numericPowerFloorHint|TriagePowerHintKey.*= nextFloor|TriagePowerHintKey.*ActualPower|TriagePowerHintKey.*float64|power hint must advance to next floor' cli/cmd cli/internal/agent` shows no production numeric bead-floor path and no tests expecting numeric bead-floor persistence.
3. `cd cli && go test ./internal/agent/... ./cmd -run 'TestNoChanges|TestFailedRoutes|TestProviderConnectivity|TestInvestigationRetry|TestTry' -count=1` passes.
4. `lefthook run pre-commit` passes.
